id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

version.description: Portable schema or package version for this record.

capsule_type.description: Discriminator identifying the record as a ContextCapsule.

purpose.description: Intent or purpose for which the context capsule was built.

task_id.description: Optional task identifier associated with the context capsule.

actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier associated with this operation or projection.

agent_id.description: Optional agent identifier associated with this operation or projection.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

token_budget.description: Token budget used when building the context projection.

included_memories.description: MemoryRecord identifiers projected into the context capsule.

included_rules.description: RuleManifest identifiers projected into the context capsule.

included_skills.description: SkillManifest identifiers projected into the context capsule.

included_tools.description: ToolBinding identifiers projected into the context capsule.

evidence_refs.description: EvidenceRef identifiers that support this record without embedding evidence payloads.

forbidden_assumptions.description: Assumptions the consuming agent must not treat as facts.

permissions.description: Portable permission envelope; implementations enforce it through local policy adapters.

expires_at.description: Optional expiration timestamp encoded as a portable string or null.

audit_refs.description: AuditEvent identifiers associated with this projection.

checksum.description: Canonical checksum for the record projection.
